name: Tai Nuea
notes: Tai Nuea / Tai Nüa (ᥖᥭᥰ ᥖᥬᥲ ᥑᥨᥒᥰ, Dehong Dai), Yunnan, China and northern Myanmar. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. The language is written in the Tai Le script (the native name above is in Tai Le), a Brahmic abugida with explicit tone letters; Wikidata records the writing system for this item as the Burmese alphabet, reflecting the script's Burmese-derived lineage. Tai Nuea is tonal and tone is written with dedicated marks. No grapheme map is claimed. wikidata_qid left unset: the code's Wikidata row resolves to the Wikimedia project item, not the language item; not recorded rather than record a wrong id.
